resolution.value: Everything was revealed to be a coma dream/hallucination from a football injury
resolution.quote: You were in a coma for 13 months said John you got hit pretty hard when you were playing football

suspect_architecture.value: Two primary suspects: Ben (predatory stranger in red pickup truck) and corrupt heavy-set police officer (later revealed as Ben)
suspect_architecture.quote: Call me Ben. Then Ben slid his hand through Harrys hair... Heavy set man got out and opened the door for harry

red_herring.value: The school bullies who locked Harry out appear as initial threat, misdirecting from the real predator Ben
red_herring.quote: Some boys locked me out of the school... the bully and his friends ran faster and shut the door

social_world.value: School hierarchy (bullies vs victims), family protective structures, police authority that becomes corrupted threat
social_world.quote: you can sit at the cool kid table at lunch... My mom said not to talk to strangers... squad car pulled up

alibi.value: Ben poses as helpful stranger offering safety, later masquerades as police officer providing legitimate protection
alibi.quote: Its ok kid im just going to take you somewhere safer... heavy set man got out and opened the door for harry

reveal_mechanic.value: Picture evidence reveals Ben and the corrupt officer are the same person, demonstrated through physical photograph
reveal_mechanic.quote: It was a picture of a fat police man, and on the back was 'BEN'

investigator_wound.value: Harry's childhood innocence and trust in authority figures exploited by predator using protective roles as cover
investigator_wound.quote: My mom said not to talk to strangers. Its ok kid im just going to take you somewhere safer
